stories.headline: Computer-assisted reporting turns on more TV journalists
stories.summary: The article discusses the growing adoption of computer-assisted reporting (CAR) among broadcasters, illustrating through anecdotes how TV journalists are applying these techniques to enhance storytelling and investigative reports.

stories.headline: A look at old, decaying dams
stories.summary: A Dateline NBC investigation reveals that thousands of aging American dams pose serious safety risks to nearby communities, with many lacking proper emergency plans and regular inspections despite their hazard ratings.
